final_answer: Hi, I'm Isabella Johansson and my ZIP code is 32286. I really need to get this sorted out quickly — I'm quite anxious to get this done! I have two requests I'd like to handle at the same time: first, I'd like to return my hose and my backpack; and second, I'd like to exchange my hiking boots for the exact same hiking boots but in a waterproof version. If you're only able to process one of these, please prioritize the exchange of the hiking boots for the waterproof version. Can we please get this taken care of as soon as possible? Thank you!
